zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine於1473年出生在英國時，她的父親Henry De Bold29歲，母親Dulcia Savage25歲。她於1490年與Giles Leigh在英國結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。她去世於1558年6月22日享年85歲，埋葬在英國素瑞沃爾頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine于1473年出生在英国时，她的父亲Henry De Bold29岁，母亲Dulcia Savage25岁。她于1490年与Giles Leigh在英国结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。她去世于1558年6月22日享年85岁，埋葬在英国素瑞沃爾頓。

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine was born in 1473, in England, her father, Henry De Bold, was 29 and her mother, Dulcia Savage, was 25. She married Giles Leigh in 1490, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. She died on 22 June 1558, at the age of 85, and was buried in Walton, Surrey, England.

Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 juin 1558, à l’âge de 85 ans, et a été enterrée à Walton, Surrey, Angleterre.

Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 22. Juni 1558 im Alter von 85 Jahren und wurde in Walton, Surrey, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherineが1473年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Henry De Boldは29歳，母Dulcia Savageは25歳であった。1490年にイギリスでGiles Leighと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1558年6月22日に85歳で死去し，イギリススリーワルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine(이)가 1473년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry De Bold(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Dulcia Savage(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1490년 영국에서 Giles Leigh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1558년 6월 22일 85세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수리 월턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine nasceu em 1473, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry De Bold, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Dulcia Savage, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Giles Leigh em 1490, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 22 de junho de 1558, com 85 anos, e foi sepultada em Walton, Surrey, Inglaterra.

ru.Walton on the Hill, Surrey, England: валтон он т хилл, сурри, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine родилась в 1473 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Henry De Bold было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Dulcia Savage, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Giles Leigh в 1490 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Она умерла 22 июня 1558 г. в возрасте 85 лет и была похоронена в местности валтон, сурри, Англия.

Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió el 22 de junio de 1558, a la edad de 85 años, y fue sepultada en Walton, Surrey, Inglaterra.
